name: Hidden Object Adventure: Captain Nemo. Objets Cachés
short_description: Accept Captain Nemo's challenge and complete 20,000 leagues under the sea! Vibrant interiors of a character vessel, magical underwater views, and tropical islands. Complex and diverse locations: experience regular landscapes alongside 360-degree panoramas and 3D views! Hidden objects game
detailed_description:
Captain Nemo: A Hidden Object Adventure Inspired by Jules Verne’s 20,000 Leagues Under the Sea

Discover the world beneath the waves in this hidden object game based on Jules Verne’s classic novel. Step aboard the Nautilus, the incredible underwater vessel of Captain Nemo, and explore the mysteries of the deep.

Follow Professor Aronnax, his assistant Conseil, and harpooner Ned Land as they set out on the frigate Abraham Lincoln to hunt down a mysterious sea creature. What they find instead changes everything — the so-called monster is a submarine unlike anything seen before. Captured by Captain Nemo, the three travelers explore breathtaking underwater worlds while dreaming of escape back to the surface.

Key Features:

  • Beautifully detailed scenes inside the Nautilus, along with magical underwater views and tropical islands.

  • A mix of classic hidden object gameplay, 360° panoramas, and 3D environments.

  • Varied challenges: find objects by name or outline, spot differences, and match pairs of items.

Jules Verne’s stories have always sparked curiosity and imagination. Captain Nemo brings that same spirit of adventure to life, perfect for anyone who loves mystery, exploration, and great hidden object games.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Czech, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian
